title: What happened to the 30 preview material Split
display_title: What happened to the 30 preview material Split
wikitext:
[]: What happened to the 3.0 preview material? [Split]             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Jun 29, 2013 8:57 pm [Split from the staff rebellion topic. Not sure where to put this yet, because there's almost too many other topics about this to choose from. Let's see where this goes, if anywhere. - Monk] But what happened with the next time preview for 3.0 at the end of 2.0? Surely there was another form of 3.0 that we didn't say and was completely overhauled into what we have now.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jun 29, 2013 8:59 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: But what happened with the next time preview for 3.0 at the end of 2.0? Surely there was another form of 3.0 that we didn't say and was completely overhauled into what we have now.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Jun 29, 2013 9:05 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: The previous is produced as part of the previous movie. It does not use actual movie footage.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jun 29, 2013 9:43 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Why wasn't that original plan for 3.0 used?

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Jun 29, 2013 9:55 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: We have nothing to indicate things didn't actually go according to the original evil keikaku (keikaku means plan).

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Jun 29, 2013 10:23 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Well I would assume things didn't go according to plan since none of the material made it over to the actual film.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jun 29, 2013 10:35 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Well I would assume things didn't go according to plan since none of the material made it over to the actual film.

[]:             Quote Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Sun Jun 30, 2013 3:53 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: We have nothing to indicate things didn't actually go according to the original evil keikaku (keikaku means plan) Wait for CRC 3.0. :P

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Jun 30, 2013 4:12 am ^ CRC = Complete Records Collection. Basically it is THE BIBLE for everything rebuild. It contains everything, from storyboards to interviews to sketches... If you can't find it in one of those books, the information you are looking for might be non-existent. There is one for 1.11 and 2.22, so hopefully we'll get one for 3.33 too.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jun 30, 2013 5:13 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: 1.0 theatrical = September 2007 1.01 DVD = April 2008 1.0 CRC = May 2008 2.0 theatrical = June 2009 2.22 DVD/BD = May 2010 2.0 CRC = September 2010

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Jun 30, 2013 5:22 am ElMariachi wrote: Can we dare hope something to come in the next months?

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Jun 30, 2013 5:45 am ElMariachi wrote: So we have a time range going from 8 months to 15 months... 3.0 theatrical was in November 2012, 7 months ago... Can we dare hope something to come in the next months?

[]:             Quote Post by iihieiii » Sun Jun 30, 2013 5:55 am Wow! Where can i find this CRC's ??? or is only availeble in dvd ?

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Jun 30, 2013 5:57 am iihieiii wrote: Wow! Where can i find this CRC's ??? or is only availeble in dvd ?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 30, 2013 6:02 am iihieiii wrote: is only availeble in dvd ?

[]:             Quote Post by iihieiii » Sun Jun 30, 2013 6:45 am I found this 2.0 crc ... [url]http://www.gwern.net/docs/2010-crc[/url] ...is this legit btw ????

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Jun 30, 2013 7:16 am Yup, it's legit.

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Sun Jun 30, 2013 7:22 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: We have nothing to indicate things didn't actually go according to the original evil keikaku (keikaku means plan)

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Jun 30, 2013 7:29 pm One line of hearsay. Wait for CRC.

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Sun Jun 30, 2013 7:44 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: One line of hearsay.
